name: forge-studio
description: Personal marketplace for optimal Claude Code behavior: discipline, context mastery, agent effectiveness, workflow patterns, and hidden gems.

plugins.name: iron-rules
plugins.description: Behavioral discipline via hooks: anti-sycophancy, destructive command blocking, self-review enforcement

plugins.name: self-critic
plugins.description: Evaluator-optimizer pattern: challenge work before completion, adversarial code review

plugins.name: context-guardian
plugins.description: Context window management: session handoffs, drift detection, checkpoint system

plugins.name: context-diet
plugins.description: Context optimization audit: analyze token waste, trim CLAUDE.md, reduce overhead

plugins.name: smart-workflow
plugins.description: Agent effectiveness patterns from Anthropic research: task routing, evidence-based verification

plugins.name: focus-mode
plugins.description: Scope enforcement: task boundaries, out-of-scope warnings, message timeboxing

plugins.name: session-mastery
plugins.description: Senior developer daily rituals: morning planning, EOD summary, weekly retrospective

plugins.name: explore-plan-code
plugins.description: Four-phase development workflow: explore with subagents, plan, implement, verify

plugins.name: power-user
plugins.description: Hidden Claude Code features: ultrathink, parallel worktrees, unix pipes, context tricks

plugins.name: quality-gates
plugins.description: PHP code quality hooks: Larastan static analysis, migration checks, pre-commit reminders
